name: Cauliflower Curry
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, heat oil and fry mustard seeds, cumin seeds, green chili, and curry leaves until the mustard seeds pop.
2. Add garlic, salt, coriander, cumin, turmeric, chili powder, tomatoes, tomato paste, and honey. Cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Stir in cauliflower, potatoes, peas, and water. Mix well, cover, and cook over medium heat for 10 minutes or until the potatoes are tender.
4. Add lemon juice and cilantro; mix and serve.
